name: create_fine_tune_job
description: Create a fine-tuning job to train a custom model on your dataset. Supports LoRA and full parameter fine-tuning on open-source base models. Upload a JSONL training file first, then reference it by ID.

parameters.name: training_file
parameters.description: The file ID of the uploaded JSONL training dataset.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: The base model ID to fine-tune.

parameters.name: n_epochs
parameters.description: Number of training epochs to run.

parameters.name: learning_rate
parameters.description: Learning rate for the fine-tuning job.

parameters.name: suffix
parameters.description: A suffix to append to the fine-tuned model name for identification.

parameters.name: training_type
parameters.description: The type of fine-tuning: 'Full' for full parameter or 'Lora' for LoRA fine-tuning.
